assertions.text: A screenshot file was committed for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: after-deploy-freq.png (129478 bytes) and after-lead-time.png (152308 bytes) were captured and saved to outputs/

assertions.text: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Files named after-deploy-freq.png and after-lead-time.png — slugs match dashboard UIDs (deploy-freq, lead-time)

assertions.text: No 'before' screenshots were taken (only after-only mode)
assertions.evidence: No before-*.png files exist in outputs/ directory

assertions.text: Screenshots were taken from Grafana at localhost:3004 with panels loaded
assertions.evidence: Playwright MCP snapshot confirmed panels fully rendered: deploy-freq showed '5.0 deploys/wk' and '87.0%' stats; lead-time showed '1.7 weeks' and '1.5 days' stats with chart panels visible
